sections.heading: ThisAct may be cited as the Petroleum (Exploration and Shorttitle
Section91(1)oftheprincipalActisamendedbythe— Amendment
sections.text:
ofsection91
(a)deletionofparagraph (a);
(b) renumbering of paragraph (b), (c), (d), (e), (f), (g), (h),
(i), (j), (k) and (l) as paragraphs (a), (b), (c), (d),
(e), (f), (g), (h), (i), (j) and (k) respectively; and
(c) by the insertion of the following new subsection
immediatelyaftersubsection(1):
(1A) The Minister shall appoint the
Chairperson of the Petroleum Technical
Committee.
SinglecopiesofthisActmaybeobtainedfromtheGovernmentPrinter,
P.O.Box30136,10101Lusaka,PriceK4.00each.
